_scenario: Toddler 18 months — Motor Development AND Communication both need improvement
_mode_note: CONCERN: significant gaps, structured targeted skill-building. LLM will dedicate 2 of 3 daily activities to the two priority domains.

day1_activities.title: Ball Roll & Chase
day1_activities.description: Roll a soft ball and encourage toddler to chase and bring it back.

day1_activities.title: Point & Name
day1_activities.description: Point to common objects around the house, say the name, wait for imitation.

day1_activities.title: Peek-a-Boo Variations
day1_activities.description: Use a cloth to hide your face and different objects. Vary pace and surprise.
